feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Private Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Private Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: CDS for Picking Process in Outbound Delivery
entry.content:
Hello, I successfully created an Outbound Delivery using I_OutboundDeliveryTP and EML with ABAP RAP. However, to Post GI for this delivery I couldn't find a way to update picking quantity for items in my outbound delivery. 

How can I do that in ABAP Cloud Private Edition? I attempted to modify the field PickQuantityInOrderUnit of the entity OutboundDeliveryItem, but I get an error that this field is read-only. Moreover, trying to create items of I_OutboundDeliveryTP using _Item association with PickQuantityInOrderUnit set resulted in the same error.

entry.title: QM Inspection Lot not generated for lot origin (14-Plant Maintenance) for Maintenance Schedule Plan
entry.content:
Hello Experts, 

we had created a maintenance plan and  we had scheduled this maintenance plan through PM module. For the maintenance plan, QM In-process Order type, Task List & Equipment is assigned to it.

We are using SAP S/4HANA Private Cloud Edition.

However, Inspection Lot is not generated for Inspection Lot Origin (14 - Plant Maintenance)

Inspection Lot not generated in QA32

Could you please advise on how to trigger  QM-Inspection Lot based on Inspection Lot Origin : 14 (Plant Maintenance). 

Thank you

kind regards

Thangaraj Thomas

entry.title: CPU Core Count details and Ramp-up possibility
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I need your suggestion on the below queries as when we are choosing any RISE BASE/PREM edition the S4HANA Production application server RAM size is coming as 64GB and consists of 8-core CPU. Now my questions on the below -

1. As we can increase the RAM size to 128 - 256 till 512 GB for the application server. Will the CPU core increase along with ?

2. If yes, then is it by default provided by SAP when the server RAM size increase ? Or do we need to take into account for any additional Product ID along with the memory increase ?

3. Also if I want to only increase the CPU Core without increasing the RAM, will it be possible ?

RISE with SAP SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition SAP IT Infrastructure Management 

Best Regards,

Abhijit Sarkar
+91-8436500911

entry.title: Letter of Credit Management (49D) Integration with SD module
entry.content:
Hello Experts, 

We are in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private edition.  Could you please advise whether Scope Item (49D) includes Integration with Sales Module (SD module) Functionality. 

Also, please advise whether scope item (49D) is available for India.

We need to assign Financial Transaction (Letter of Credit - Receivable) created in FTR_CREATE  in Sales Order. 

Further based on this assignment, we need to have controls based on Letter of Credit (LC) validity and value in the subsequent process of sales order like Delivery & Billing document. 

Could you please advise whether this is possible in SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Private Edition. 

Thank you

kind regards

Thangaraj Thomas

entry.title: SAP DC, Connectivity options and details
entry.content:
Hi,

  we are going to need 2 connections for SAP RISE with SAP datacenter (base option). The customer wants to use mpls as primary connectivity option and VPN as backup one (both wired and radiofrequency). Our communications teams has launched these questions, could you help us with them:

For the case of MPLS, what connectivity options would be available? Do you offer any service to connect to the environment, like Fabric or something similar? Is it possible to connect through the Data Center’s MMR ? Is it necessary to install a CPE, or can we connect to a provider's device?

For base option in europe , only Rot Germany is available ? 

In the Communications Datasheet template for SAP DC, only the VPN option is listed in the tabs. how can we request an MPLS connection for base option ?

best regards

entry.title: Alternates in Bill of Materials and backflushing
entry.content:
We work with S/4 HANA cloud private edition and Digital Manufacturing cloud. In our company we have a BOM created in ERP and transferred as Order BOM to DM. Components in this BOM are backflushed. 

During production, there was a problem with a component. We need to use an alternate component for this. Unfortunately this alternate is not consumed when production order confirmations / yield is received by ERP. The original components which was in the BOM in ERP is consumed even if we selected the alternate component in DM. 

How can we achieve this?

entry.title: What are the challenges faced related to Fi during the SAP S/4HANA upgrade from 2022 to 2023 FPS02?
entry.content: Hi, I am working on a upgrade project SAP S/4HANA upgrade from 2022 to 2023 FPS02 and I needed to know what are the common possible challenges/Issues/ faced  during this in Finance?

entry.title: I get the following message: No position type exists (table T184 ZPVL TEXT )
entry.content:
Good morning, gentlemen.

I have a problem and I would like you to help me please.

I am making an extension (Z) to VA01 when creating a Sales Order that deals with the following:

1-Internally I take the position that is already created at that time, I make some validations and that position with the same material I have to divide it into position 10 and position 20 modifying the quantities and the PSTYV

2-To eliminate the original position with which the sales order was created I use the bapi BAPI_SALESORDER_CHANGE and it works perfectly.

3.-The next step is to create those 2 new positions 10 and 20 with the new quantities and with the new PSTYV and for this I am using the bapi BAPI_SALESORDER_CREATEFROMDAT2, where I pass the vbeln and the tables with the new positions.

The problem is that when I run the bapi BAPI_SALESORDER_CREATEFROMDAT2 I get the following error message: No position type exists (table T184 ZPVL TEXT )

What could be happening please?
Thanks

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition - Service Order Process
entry.content:
In this document, the Service Order Process in SAP S/4 HANA Service will be shown.

The process consists of several phases and initially includes:

  1. Creation of Service Order Quotation
  2. Creation of Service Order
  3. Creation of Sales Order

1* Step: Creation of Service Order Quotation

The process starts with the Creation of a Service Order Quotation, using the “Create Service Order Quotation” Fiori APP and the Document Type “SRVQ – Service Order Quotation”.

It is important to note that with the Item Category “SRQS – Sales Item”, it will be possible to proceed with the process using a Delivery Document for a Customer Shipment.

  • Transaction Category: BUS2000116
  • Transaction Type: SRVQ – Service Order Quotation
  • Item Category: SRQS – Sales Item

Upon saving of the Service Quotation, the system will automatically create the Service Order. This occurs only if the necessary customizing settings have been correctly defined; otherwise, it will be necessary to create the Service Order as a follow-up document of the Service Quotation.

2* Step: Creation of Service Order

Upon saving the Service Quotation, the system will automatically create the Service Order as a Follow-Up Document.

  • Transaction Category: BUS2000116
  • Transaction Type: SRVO – Service Order
  • Item Category: SRVS – Sales Item

You can choose the Item from the Service Order Quotation:

In order to create the Sales Order from the Service Order, it is necessary to Release the Service Order. You can release the Service Order from the "Service Order Datails" tab:

Upon saving the Service Order, the system will automatically generate the Sales Order, from which the delivery can be processed. The Sales Order will inherit the main data from the Service Order, including the information related to the parties involved in the transaction. The Document Flow will be updated in the "Transaction History" tab of SrvOrd:

entry.title: Question about 10Steps2S4 for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Conversion in 2025
entry.content:
Good evening, everyone!

Does anyone know if there is a 10Steps2S4 for Functionals focused on the conversion to SAP S/4HANA Cloud, private edition in 2025? If anyone can confirm or has more details, I’d really appreciate it!

#SAPS/4HANA #10Steps2S4

Heitor Lima

entry.title: Company code not assigned to C/R or C/R to calculation procedure
entry.content:
Hi, 

I am creating Vendor in BP, while updating company code with supplier i am getting below mentioned error. 

Company code not assigned to C/R or C/R to calculation procedure

This is a new company code i have created and no tax calculation procedure is yet defined. 

I have also checked settings in tax on sale/purchase<assign country/region to calculation procedure and assigned company code against Country. 

The error still persist!

Kindly help.

entry.title: SD self-billing - SAFT
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

We are working on the SD self-billing process for our project. This is a Portuguese company, and the end customer sends the self-billing document. Our company needs to create the billing document using the SD module to "replicate" the document created by the end customer and handle all subsequent processes.

We want to ensure compliance with Portuguese legal requirements. According to our customer, this SD self-billing document should not have a digital signature and should not be included in the SAFT file.

We have a specific SD document type and a specific number range for this type of document. However, according to SAP Note 2642802, “Since the publication of Despacho 8632/2014, all documents generated in SD (invoices, credit notes, debit notes, pro-formas, deliveries, etc.) must be digitally signed.” This means we cannot create an SD invoice without a digital signature.

We have tried to find information on how to exclude the digital signature in SAP documentation (https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/9b351d6e33a0496598e4b58782565e8a/9ce5465761a14af4908511c0348360b3.html) or in the SAFT for Portugal user guide PDF from SAP (https://help.sap.com/doc/a3fc11aded07460d99f1f938e1c29496/6.18.latest/en-US/User%20Guide%20for%20SAF-T%20Portugal%20v1.15.pdf), but we could not find this scenario in the documentation. In these two links, we found information about self-billing in the MM (Materials Management) scenario, but not in the SD (Sales and Distribution) scenario like ours.

We have a few questions:

  1. How can we create an SD billing document without a digital signature in this particular scenario?
  2. How should we customize our billing type to indicate that this is a self-billing document?
  3. How can we exclude this document from the SAFT file? According to Chapter 4.2 of the SAFT for Portugal user guide, we did not find this scenario covered.

Thank you for your help.

#SD #SAFT #Portugal #selfbilling #DigitalSignature #SIPT

Ana Machado

entry.title: Need help adding Live Connection from SAC to S/4Hana Public Cloud
entry.content:
Cannot add Live connection from S/4Hana Public Cloud
Both SAC and S/4Hana use the same identity provider (IAS)
Already created communication user (which is "SAC_LIVE_USER" in the screenshot)

All configurations follow this instruction

I tried to find a way to configure the InA role in S/4Hana but not found it yet.

Thanks,
Pakorn

entry.title: Tax number IN0 is required for Customer : tax number table on tab Identification
entry.content:
Hello Experts, 

We have below error message while creating customer in BP Tcode. We are unable to save customer master record due to this error.

Tax number IN0 is required for Customer -> tax num table on tab "Identification"

Message No. CVIS_UI_GENERIC001

We are using SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition 2023.

Could you please advise on how to solve this issue.

Thank you,

kind regards

Thangaraj Thomas

entry.title: How to create Business Partner (BP) and customer master (Role : FLCU01 & Role : FLCU00) using BAPI
entry.content:
Hello Experts, 

Could you please advise on how to create Business Partner (BP) and customer master (Role : FLCU01 & Role : FLCU00) using BAPI  in SAP S/4HANA Private Cloud. 

We have the Business Partner (BP) number range set as Internal and Customer Account Group number range set as External. 

This requirement is for India specific and we need to maintain GST number (Tax category : IN3 ) and PAN number field values and it also need to be uploaded using BAPI.

Could you please advise on the BAPI to be used and steps to be followed for creation.

Thank you,

kind regards

Thangaraj Thomas

entry.title: Internal Number range skip in vendor master upload using Migration cockpit
entry.content:
Hello Experts, 

We are using Migration cockpit for uploading vendor master in SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Private Edition.  We have vendor number range and BP number range set as Internal.

While uploading, vendor number range is skipped and please refer below screenshot.  In customizing, we have set as no buffering.

Could you please advise on the SAP Standard behavior on the Internal number range skip in vendor master although in customizing it is maintained as No buffering.

Could you please advise on this. 

Thank you,

kind regards

Thangaraj Thomas

entry.title: Profit center determination in service orders
entry.content:
Hi experts.

We are configuring the process "Corrective Service with Advanced Execution" (6AU). Every time we add a product in a service order the error "No profit center can be derived" appears, no matter what service product is added:

The substitution rule for CRM is already set:

The material has a profit center in the master data and the service organization also has a cost center assing:

 

But the profit center determination is failing. Has anyone had this error? What is the way to solve it. Thanks in advance.

Best regards.

David Avila.

entry.title: SAP HCM for SAP Cloud Private Edition
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have spent many days exploring documentation on RISE with SAP and the conversion guides for transitioning for SAP ERP to SAP Hana Cloud Private Edition. Globally I do have an overview of how this is working and what are the steps to be taken for the conversion process. 

The scenario I do not understand regarding the conversion process is when SAP ERP system is used for different modules like FI, CO, SD, MM and also HCM within the same client and the business need is to only migrate HCM to SAP Cloud Private Edition  and keep the rest of the modules (FI, SD, MM ) as they are on the SAP ERP system. Is it possible to only migrate HCM to SAP Cloud Private Edition or the whole SAP ERP system should be converted including all modules?  during the conversion process is there any step where only specific modules and application can be selected for the conversion?

Many thanks

Rachid.

entry.title: Time to delivery Application Server for Linux
entry.content:
Hi,

How long will it take to deliver SKU 8018042 - SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition Application Server for Linux, additional production tenant

Tks a lot

entry.title: PCE Brownfield migration procedure.
entry.content:
I already looked into the document 'Partner Led Migrations - ECS supported Migration approaches' 

So I do understand that migration server will be provided for upload the migration data. 

But i have three question for this migration server. 

1. Is this migration server free of charge or occur extra charge?

2. Is this migration server provided with certain version of OS? Or is it just empty server so partner should build from installing the OS?

3. is it possible that we just upload the HANA DB Data backup for system copy instead of installing the whole SAP system on the migration server? Or is it necessary run SWPM on migration server with the backup from original server? 

Regards, 

Yongjun Yoon
